scripts.setup:simulation: python -m pip install -r apps/simulation/requirements.txt && python -m pip install -e packages/rail-controllers
scripts.predev: npm run setup:simulation && npm run build:native -w @real-pendulum/physical-motor-service && npx --yes kill-port 4000 50051 50052 58871 58872 5173 5174
scripts.dev:stack: concurrently -n motor,sensor,physics,controllers,api,web -c blue,green,white,magenta,yellow,red "npm run dev -w @real-pendulum/physical-motor-service" "npm run dev -w @real-pendulum/physical-sensor-service" "npm run dev -w @real-pendulum/simulation" "npm run dev -w @real-pendulum/controller-service" "wait-on -t 120000 tcp:127.0.0.1:58871 tcp:127.0.0.1:58872 && npm run dev -w @real-pendulum/control-api" "wait-on -t 120000 tcp:127.0.0.1:4000 && npm run dev -w web"
scripts.dev:no-kill:stack: npm run setup:simulation && npm run build:native -w @real-pendulum/physical-motor-service && concurrently -n motor,sensor,physics,controllers,api,web -c blue,green,white,magenta,yellow,red "npm run dev -w @real-pendulum/physical-motor-service" "npm run dev -w @real-pendulum/physical-sensor-service" "npm run dev -w @real-pendulum/simulation" "npm run dev -w @real-pendulum/controller-service" "wait-on -t 120000 tcp:127.0.0.1:58871 tcp:127.0.0.1:58872 && npm run dev -w @real-pendulum/control-api" "wait-on -t 120000 tcp:127.0.0.1:4000 && npm run dev -w web"
